requirement_topic.en: TRA Mandatory Radio Type Approval (ITSEC Mark)
requirement_topic.zh: TRA强制无线电型号认证（ITSEC标志）
requirement_topic.zht: TRA強制無線電型號認證（ITSEC標誌）

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, IoT, and any device using radio spectrum) must obtain TRA mandatory type approval under UAE Federal Law No. 3 of 2003 on Telecommunications before import or sale in the UAE. Equipment must carry the TRA ITSEC mark on the device and packaging label; the TRA approval number must appear on the label. Approval requires test reports from an accredited laboratory to ETSI or IEC/ITU standards accepted by TRA. CE Declaration of Conformity, FCC ID, and SRRC certificates are not accepted as substitutes. The GCC Mutual Recognition Arrangement (GCC MRA) provides recognition within Gulf Cooperation Council member states only and does not extend to EU or US approvals.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa、物联网及任何使用无线频谱的设备）须依据阿联酋《2003年第3号联邦电信法》取得TRA强制型号认证，方可进口或在阿联酋销售。设备及包装标签须加贴TRA ITSEC标志，并须标注TRA审批号。认证需提交获TRA认可的实验室依据ETSI或IEC/ITU标准出具的测试报告。CE符合性声明、FCC ID及SRRC证书不可作为替代。海湾合作委员会相互承认协议（GCC MRA）仅在GCC成员国内有效，不延伸至欧盟或美国的批准。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa、物聯網及任何使用無線頻譜的設備）須依據阿聯酋《2003年第3號聯邦電信法》取得TRA強制型號認證，方可進口或在阿聯酋銷售。設備及包裝標籤須加貼TRA ITSEC標誌，並須標注TRA審批號。認證需提交獲TRA認可的實驗室依據ETSI或IEC/ITU標準出具的測試報告。CE符合性聲明、FCC ID及SRRC證書不可作為替代。海灣合作委員會相互承認協議（GCC MRA）僅在GCC成員國內有效，不延伸至歐盟或美國的批准。

standards_or_laws: UAE Federal Law No. 3 of 2003 on Telecommunications
TRA Type Approval Procedures and Requirements

summary.en: In China, radio type approval is administered by MIIT/SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China). Telecom terminal equipment (devices connecting to public telecom networks) additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety and EMC for in-scope products under the CCC catalogue.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电型号认证由工信部/国家无线电管理局（SRRC）负责。连接公共电信网络的电信终端设备还须取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）涵盖列入CCC目录的产品的电气安全和EMC。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電型號認證由工信部/國家無線電管理局（SRRC）負責。連接公共電信網路的電信終端設備還須取得工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）涵蓋列入CCC目錄的產品的電氣安全和EMC。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (Regulations on Radio Administration, Article 58)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Telecom Equipment Access

gap.en: TRA type approval is a wholly independent process from SRRC, CCC, CE, or FCC. Neither SRRC approval nor CCC certification is recognised by TRA. The GCC MRA covers recognition only among Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, and Oman — it does not extend to China, EU, or US approvals. A fresh TRA application with accredited-lab test reports, TRA ITSEC mark, and TRA approval number on label is required for every model sold or imported into UAE.
gap.zh: TRA型号认证与SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全独立。TRA不承认SRRC批准或CCC认证。GCC相互承认协议仅覆盖沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋、科威特、卡塔尔、巴林和阿曼之间的相互承认，不延伸至中国、欧盟或美国的批准。每款在阿联酋销售或进口的产品均须重新进行TRA申请，提交经认可实验室出具的测试报告，并在标签上标注TRA ITSEC标志和TRA审批号。
gap.zht: TRA型號認證與SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全獨立。TRA不承認SRRC批准或CCC認證。GCC相互承認協議僅涵蓋沙烏地阿拉伯、阿聯酋、科威特、卡達、巴林和阿曼之間的相互承認，不延伸至中國、歐盟或美國的批准。每款在阿聯酋銷售或進口的產品均須重新進行TRA申請，提交經認可實驗室出具的測試報告，並在標籤上標注TRA ITSEC標誌和TRA審批號。

source.publisher: TRA — Telecommunications and Digital Government Regulatory Authority (UAE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TRA type approval and the ITSEC mark are mandatory for all wireless and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in the UAE. SRRC, CCC, CE DoC, and FCC ID are not accepted substitutes. The GCC MRA does not extend recognition to Chinese approvals.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] TRA型号认证和ITSEC标志对所有在阿联酋进口或销售的无线及电信终端设备为强制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作为替代。GCC MRA不延伸承认中国批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] TRA型號認證和ITSEC標誌對所有在阿聯酋進口或銷售的無線及電信終端設備為強制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作為替代。GCC MRA不延伸承認中國批准。
